title: Space Explorer
description: Build an interactive space-themed animation step by step. You'll move sprites, loop animations, handle key presses, track scores with variables, send broadcasts between sprites, and talk to the player!

tasks.title: Launch the Rocket
tasks.explainer:
Your rocket is waiting on the left side of the stage. When the green flag is clicked, make it **move 150 steps** to the right.

**How to do it:**
1. Drag a `scratch:when green flag clicked` block from **Events**.
2. Snap a `scratch:move [] steps` block underneath it from **Motion**.
3. Change the number to `150`.

Click the **green flag** button to test it!

> The check passes automatically when the rocket reaches the right side of the stage.
tasks.toolbox: <xml><category name="Events" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="event_whenflagclicked"/></category><category name="Motion" colour="#4C97FF"><block type="motion_movesteps"/><block type="motion_gotoxy"/><block type="motion_setx"/><block type="motion_sety"/><block type="motion_xposition"/><block type="motion_yposition"/></category></xml>

tasks.title: Bounce Forever
tasks.explainer:
Make the **Ball** animate on its own — bouncing back and forth across the stage forever.

**Your goal:**
- Use a `scratch:forever` loop from **Control**
- Inside it, put `scratch:move 5 steps` from **Motion**
- Add `scratch:if on edge, bounce` so it reverses direction
- Add `scratch:set rotation style 'left-right'` so it doesn't flip upside-down

```scratch
when green flag clicked
set rotation style 'left-right'
forever
  move 5 steps
  if on edge, bounce
```

> **Bonus:** Add `turn right 3 degrees` inside the loop to make it curve!

Click **Check** when your ball is bouncing.
tasks.toolbox: <xml><category name="Events" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="event_whenflagclicked"/></category><category name="Motion" colour="#4C97FF"><block type="motion_movesteps"/><block type="motion_turnright"/><block type="motion_turnleft"/><block type="motion_ifonedge_bounce"/><block type="motion_setrotationstyle"/></category><category name="Control" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="control_forever"/><block type="control_repeat"/><block type="control_wait"/></category></xml>

tasks.title: Looks and Sound
tasks.explainer:
Make the cat come to life! When the green flag is clicked, the cat should:

1. **Grow bigger** — use `scratch:change size by 20` from **Looks**
2. **Say** `scratch:say "Hello, space explorer!"` for `2` seconds
3. **Play a sound** — use `scratch: start sound 'chime'` from **Sound**
4. **Think** something — try `scratch: think "Amazing..." for 2 seconds`

> Sounds are made with the Web Audio API — pop, meow, click, and chime are available.

Click **Check** once the cat has a speech bubble.
tasks.toolbox: <xml><category name="Events" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="event_whenflagclicked"/></category><category name="Looks" colour="#9966FF"><block type="looks_sayforsecs"/><block type="looks_say"/><block type="looks_thinkforsecs"/><block type="looks_think"/><block type="looks_show"/><block type="looks_hide"/><block type="looks_setsizeto"/><block type="looks_changesizeby"/></category><category name="Sound" colour="#CF63CF"><block type="sound_play"/><block type="sound_playuntildone"/><block type="sound_stopallsounds"/></category><category name="Control" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="control_wait"/></category></xml>

tasks.title: Keyboard Controls
tasks.explainer:
Let's make the rocket controllable with the **arrow keys**!

Use `scratch:when [] key pressed` blocks from **Events** — one for each direction:

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| Up arrow | `scratch:change y by 10` |
| Down arrow | `scratch:change y by -10` |
| Left arrow | `scratch:change x by -10` |
| Right arrow | `scratch:change x by 10` |

You'll need **four separate event blocks** — one per arrow key. Each connects to a different motion block.

> **Tip:** Click the dropdown on the key block to pick each arrow key.

Press the arrow keys to fly around! Click **Check** when it moves.
tasks.toolbox: <xml><category name="Events" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="event_whenflagclicked"/><block type="event_whenkeypressed"/></category><category name="Motion" colour="#4C97FF"><block type="motion_changexby"/><block type="motion_changeyby"/><block type="motion_pointindirection"/><block type="motion_ifonedge_bounce"/><block type="motion_movesteps"/></category><category name="Control" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="control_if"/><block type="control_if_else"/></category><category name="Sensing" colour="#5CB1D6"><block type="sensing_keypressed"/><block type="sensing_touchingedge"/></category></xml>

tasks.title: Score Counter
tasks.explainer:
Let's use a **variable** to track a score. Variables are like boxes that store a number — you can read and change them at any time.

**Your goal:** When the green flag is clicked:
1. **Set** `scratch: Set 'score' to `0`
2. Use `scratch:repeat 5` to loop 5 times
3. Inside the loop: **`change score by 1`**
4. After the loop: make the star **say** the score

The check passes automatically when `score` equals `5` after your program finishes.

> **How to say the score:** drag the orange `score` variable block into the `say` block's message slot.
tasks.toolbox: <xml><category name="Events" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="event_whenflagclicked"/></category><category name="Control" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="control_repeat"/><block type="control_wait"/></category><category name="Variables" colour="#FF8C1A"><block type="data_setvariableto"/><block type="data_changevariableby"/><block type="data_variable"/></category><category name="Looks" colour="#9966FF"><block type="looks_say"/><block type="looks_sayforsecs"/></category><category name="Operators" colour="#59C059"><block type="operator_add"/></category></xml>

tasks.title: Two Sprites and Broadcasts
tasks.explainer:
There are now **two sprites** on the stage: a **Rocket** and a **Star**. Broadcasts let sprites send messages to each other!

**Your goal:**
- **Rocket:** 
```scratch:
When green flag clicked
move 80 steps
broadcast `"launch"
```
- **Star:** 
```scratch
When I receive `"launch"`
glide to a new position
```

**Switching sprites:** Click the sprite name buttons below the stage to write code for each one separately.

```scratch
when green flag clicked
move (80) steps
broadcast [launch]
```
```scratch
when I receive [launch]
glide (1) secs to x:(80) y:(50)
```

Click **Check** once you've added a broadcast block.
tasks.toolbox: <xml><category name="Events" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="event_whenflagclicked"/><block type="event_broadcast"/><block type="event_broadcastandwait"/><block type="event_whenbroadcastreceived"/><block type="event_whenthisspriteclicked"/></category><category name="Motion" colour="#4C97FF"><block type="motion_movesteps"/><block type="motion_glidesecstoxy"/><block type="motion_gotoxy"/><block type="motion_changexby"/><block type="motion_changeyby"/></category><category name="Looks" colour="#9966FF"><block type="looks_say"/><block type="looks_sayforsecs"/><block type="looks_show"/><block type="looks_hide"/></category><category name="Control" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="control_wait"/></category></xml>

tasks.title: Ask and Answer
tasks.explainer:
The parrot wants to know your name! Use **Sensing** to ask a question — the player's answer is stored in the special `answer` block.

**Your goal:**
1. Use `scratch:ask [What is your name?] and wait` from **Sensing**
2. Then make the parrot say a greeting using `scratch:join` from **Operators**
3. Combine `"Hello, "` with `answer` to build a custom message

> **How `scratch:join` works:** it sticks two pieces of text together.
> - Slot 1: `"Hello, "`
> - Slot 2: drag in the orange `answer` block

```scratch
when green flag clicked
ask [What is your name?] and wait
say <<join [Hello]  [answer]>> for 2 seconds
```
Click **Check** once the parrot asks a question.
tasks.toolbox: <xml><category name="Events" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="event_whenflagclicked"/></category><category name="Sensing" colour="#5CB1D6"><block type="sensing_askandwait"/><block type="sensing_answer"/><block type="sensing_keypressed"/><block type="sensing_mousedown"/><block type="sensing_touchingedge"/></category><category name="Looks" colour="#9966FF"><block type="looks_sayforsecs"/><block type="looks_say"/></category><category name="Operators" colour="#59C059"><block type="operator_join"/><block type="operator_equals"/><block type="operator_add"/><block type="operator_not"/><block type="operator_and"/><block type="operator_or"/></category><category name="Control" colour="#FFAB19"><block type="control_if"/><block type="control_if_else"/></category></xml>
